item.title: Steam Users Have Until April 23 to Download a 2017 Sci-Fi Game for Free
item.description:
Steam users looking for something free need look no further than its current offerings on the Free-to-Keep promotion, with the latest being a 2017 sci-fi game called Sentience: The Android's Tale . Steam users just need to act quickly to take advantage of the promotion.

Every so often, Steam makes a couple of paid games available completely free of charge for a specified time—the Free-to-Keep promotion. In fact, Steam users can still download the dungeon management game Legend of Keeper: Career of a Dungeon Manager for free until April 23, 2026, too. Players take on the role of an employee for the Dungeons Company in that game and go about managing and defending them against would-be heroes. It's a cute, fantasy concept, but for someone more into Sci-Fi, that may not really scratch that itch. Sentience: The Android's Tale is a different story.

Download Sentience: The Android's Tale Free on Steam

  • Download Sentience for Free (Until April 23 at 10 am PT/1 pm ET)
  • Download Legend of Keeper: Career of a Dungeon Manager for Free, Too (Until April 23 at 10 am PT/1 pm ET)

Developed by Pilgrim Adventures and published by GrabTheGames, Sentience: The Android's Tale is a choice-based narrative game where players take on the role of the titular Android. Steam users have until April 23 at 10 am PT/1 pm ET to download the game for free , but they should still keep expectations in check. Sentience is a premium title aside from this Free-to-Keep period, but it is not a particularly expensive one. It typically costs $5, making it a budget game on Steam on any normal day of the week. That said, it's free, and $5 is $5. There's no harm in checking it out.

The narrative is influenced by player decisions, in which players make choices as an Android: to be a servant or to be their own entity. At the same time, they can learn from the forgotten pioneers on the sci-fi planet Akritas, especially as players work to gain their trust. Beyond the narrative influence, most of Sentience 's gameplay is classic point-and-click adventure game stuff, so players should expect a chill, if serious experience—the game explores themes about the sheer concept of intelligence and being, after all.

The end result is at least a dozen possible endings, where every major character can survive or perish based on the player's choices and actions. Overall, Sentience sounds like a budget sci-fi take on the gameplay offered by The Dark Pictures Anthology , which is the most apt description or comparison one could make. It's not on the level of choice-based games like Dispatch , but those looking forward to a new choice-based game might enjoy this one (again, it's free!)

Balance the critic averages

In the meantime, Steam users can keep an ear to the ground for more news on its Free-to-Keep promotion. More announcements are expected in the next couple of days/weeks, so if a sci-fi or fantasy game on Steam still doesn't quite scratch that gaming itch for you, maybe something else will come along soon and do it.

item.title: How to Find Pirate's Chest in Windrose (15 Men on a Dead Man's Chest)
item.description:
Windrose throws you straight into the action with some tricky quests, all while you are busy dealing with deadly enemies. While quests are the gateway to levelling up, figuring out some quests without help can be a pirate's worst nightmare.

One of the first quests you’ll come across is 15 Men on a Dead Man’s Chest . It asks you to find a Pirate’s Chest. It seems simple, but a lot of players end up running around the marked area, wondering if the game is bugged. Worry not, as the game isn't bugged, and we've got the solution right here.

​

How to Get Pirate’s Chest in Windrose

Fifteen Men on a Dead Man’s Chest

When you unlock this quest, the game marks a spot on your map. Naturally, you would expect the Pirate’s Chest to be right there. But when you reach the location, you see nothing. This is where most players get stuck.

The chest is actually at that exact spot. The catch is that it is buried underground and you need a shovel to dig it out.

If you don’t have a shovel yet, then you can craft it on the workbench, but the recipe only unlocks after you collect three Copper Ingots.

How to Craft the Shovel in Windrose

Getting Copper Ingots takes a bit of setup. First, you need to mine Copper from deposits found inside caves. These caves are easy to spot on the map thanks to the pickaxe icon .

After you have enough Copper, place 12 Copper in the furnace to turn it into three ingots. You will also need one Charcoal to fuel the process, which you can make by putting a piece of wood into the Charcoal Kiln.

Wood is the easy part. Just equip your axe and chop down a few trees. You will have more than enough in no time. In total, you will need x11 Wood to cover everything.

Subscribe for more Windrose quest guides and tips

Hungry for more Windrose shortcuts? Subscribe to our newsletter for step-by-step quest solutions, crafting recipes, and combat strategies that help you unearth hidden loot and finish tricky objectives with confidence.
By subscribing, you agree to receive newsletter and marketing emails, and accept our Terms of Use and Privacy Policy. You can unsubscribe anytime.

Here's a look at the shovel recipe:

  • 3x Copper Ingots
  • 10x Wood

Once you have the shovel ready, you’ll need to go back to the marked spot on your map and start digging. After a bit of digging, you will find the Pirate’s Chest.

Be careful, the moment you dig up the Pirate's Chest, a group of Drowned will spawn to attack you, so you'd best be prepared for a fight!

With the Drowned now dead, you can return to the chest and open it to complete the 15 Men on a Dead Man’s Chest quest. As a reward, Windrose players will get five Guineas and four Silver Ingots.

Windrose

Followed

item.title: Pokemon GO Reveals Raid Day Schedule for May 2026
item.description:
Pokemon GO developer Niantic has pulled back the curtain on its plans for May, revealing Raid Day events scheduled for the month. The 10th anniversary of Pokemon GO is coming up in July, and Niantic has been teasing how it will commemorate the major milestone. Over the last decade, the game has become a vital part of the Pokemon franchise, bringing in newcomers while also attracting lapsed fans.

With May nearly here, there have already been multiple announcements about Pokemon GO . The month will see two Community Day events. Pokemon GO will have a Lechonk Community Day on May 9, while a Community Day Classic will take place on May 16. Niantic has not revealed which Pokemon will return to the spotlight for the latter event.

Pokemon GO May Raid Day Schedule

  • May 2- Entei Shadow Raid Day from 2 to 5 PM local time
  • May 23- Mega Raid Day

Pokemon GO fans can look forward to two different Raid Day events in the month of May. An Entei Shadow Raid Day will take place on May 2, putting a spotlight on a Legendary Pokemon that first appeared in the Johto region. The Fire-type has seen a lot of focus lately, as Pokemon GO has an Entei encounter as an April GO Pass reward. For those who are worried they won't be able to complete the GO Pass before time runs out, the Shadow Raid Day is another opportunity to add Entei to the Pokedex. Players will also have an increased chance of encountering a Shiny Entei during the event next month. The Remote Raid limit will also be increased to 20. Additionally, Shadow Cresselia will appear in Shadow Raids between May 6 and June 2.

At this time, details for Pokemon GO 's Mega Raid Day on May 23 have not been revealed. However, Mega Camerupt, Mega Glalie, Mega Altaria, and Mega Medicham will be appearing in Mega Raids, with each one taking over on a weekly basis. Five-Star Raids will feature Pokemon from Alola, with Nihilego, Tapu Bulu, and Tapu Fini appearing for all players. From May 13–19, Five-Star Raids will vary by region, as Buzzwole will be available in the Americas and Greenland, Pheromosa in Europe, the Middle East, and India, and Xurkitree in Asia Pacific locations.

In addition to everything on this month's schedule, a major event will start to roll out at the end of May. The first Pokemon GO Fest 2026 in-person event begins next month in Tokyo, with events to follow in Chicago and Copenhagen in June. Fans that are unable to attend in-person Pokemon GO events will still get to partake in the festivities, but they'll have to wait a little bit longer, as the Global event will take place in July. Few details have been revealed, but Pokemon GO Fest 2026 will put a big focus on Mewtwo.

New Questions Added!

GameRant Quiz

—

QUESTION 1/1

Results

0

—

More Games
New Questions Added!
GameRant Quiz
Easy (15s)Medium (10s)Hard (5s)Permadeath (5s)
—
QUESTION 1/1
Results
0
—
More Games

One of the big rumors among players is that Mega Mewtwo X and Y will debut at Pokemon GO Fest 2026. Mega Evolutions have been part of the game for several years now, but Mega Mewtwo has thus far remained exclusive to the mainline Pokemon games. It seems that the long wait could soon come to an end, but fans will have to wait a little bit longer to see what Niantic has in store.

Pokemon GO

Follow
Followed

RPG
Systems
Released
July 6, 2016
Developer(s)
Niantic
Publisher(s)
Niantic
Engine
Unity
Multiplayer
Online Multiplayer, Online Co-Op
7 Images

WHERE TO PLAY

DIGITAL
PHYSICAL

Pokémon GO is an immersive open-world multiplayer RPG that enables you to live your own RPG adventure in augmented reality. Find and evolve all Pokémon and battle with other players in AR online in this multiplayer adventure RPG.

COMPLETE YOUR POKÉDEX AND INCREASE YOUR TRAINER LEVEL!
Catch your favourite Pokémon as you explore the open world in augmented reality, trade them with other Trainers, or get the chance to catch a Pokémon after winning a Raid. You can also collect Pokémon by hatching eggs through walking! Evolve your Pokémon in your Pokédex, gain levels to catch more powerful Pokémon and earn adventure rewards during a Raid in multiplayer or online PvP battle.

EXPERIENCE THE ADVENTURE IN MULTIPLAYER AND PvP!
Start your own adventure and challenge other Trainers online in PvP during epic Gym battles or in the GO Battle League. You can also enjoy multiplayer by facing off with other players in PvP battles to win rewards, or team up with other Trainers for a chance to catch Pokémon after a Raid Battle.

CREATE YOUR OWN ADVENTURE!
Customise your avatar, join one of the three teams and pick your Buddy Pokémon from your Pokédex to journey by your side in this AR adventure RPG.

SWITCH BETWEEN THE REAL WORLD AND THE VIRTUAL WORLD WITH THE AR+ MODE!
Bring the RPG to the real world and search for Pokémon in locations around you. With the AR+ mode, Pokémon appear right in front of you — Catch it with your PokéBall and add it to your Pokédex.

Catch your favourite Pokémon in AR as you explore the world and battle online with other Trainers in PvP and Raid battles.

Cross-Platform Play
Yes
Cross Save

Platform(s)

Powered by

item.title: Open-World Military Sim Game on Steam is Giving ARC Raiders, Marathon, and Battlefield a Run for Their Money
item.description:
It’s no great secret that shooters are immensely popular, but the genre has morphed a bit since the early days of Halo and Medal of Honor . This is particularly true in the competitive scene, where games like ARC Raiders , which is much more focused on discovery, exploration, and stealth, manage to wipe the floor with traditional shooters like Call of Duty . This is a good thing: even if I don’t personally like extraction shooters as much as traditional ones, more diversity and experimentation within the online shooter scene makes for a more exciting, richer gaming landscape as a whole.

At the same time, shooters are more fickle than ever. With the live-service model, it’s not enough for these kinds of games to launch with a solid set of features and content; they have to maintain themselves and continue to hold the attention of their audience. Perhaps this is why, despite their immense initial success, both ARC Raiders and Battlefield 6 have seen major drop-offs in player counts, as the more transient members of their playerbase move on to other games. One such game is Gray Zone Warfare , a shooter that, despite still being in early access, has drawn a number of comparisons to the aforementioned titles, as well as Marathon and Escape from Tarkov . These comparisons have been generally favorable for Gray Zone Warfare , which is threatening to grow into a massive hit.

What Is Gray Zone Warfare, the Early Access Shooter Sweeping Steam?

  • Check out Gray Zone Warfare on Steam

Gray Zone Warfare is set on a “Southeast Asian island” that’s been torn apart by civil warfare, but there’s a bit more to it than that. Gray Zone ’s developer, MADFINGER Games, has been transparent about the game being inspired by Roadside Picnic , the same seminal sci-fi novel that inspired the likes of Metro 2033 and the S.T.A.L.K.E.R. games. This adds an undeniable element of mystery to Gray Zone 's world, as there’s always a deeper, more unsettling narrative underpinning its seemingly traditional military sim trappings.

And Gray Zone Warfare certainly does lean into its military sim roots, placing heavy emphasis on tactics, forethought, strategy, and teamwork. Gunplay is complex and weighty, healing is realistic and compartmentalized, and damage can result in persistent, noticeable changes, like a cavity left behind on a character model after being shot. These creative choices, coupled with Gray Zone Warfare ’s lifelike graphics, have elicited comparisons to Escape from Tarkov , although it seems to have escaped many of the criticisms leveled against Tarkov , like poor optimization and bugginess.

Gray Zone Warfare’s PvE Options

One of the biggest complaints leveled against ARC Raiders relates to its lack of PvE options. Of course, this is not really a shortcoming of the game in the strictest sense, as developer Embark Studios has been clear that this is by design: ARC Raiders is meant to be competitive, and “forced” PvP has been deemed an essential part of this formula. But still, not every player appreciates the stress and pressure that comes along with PvP in an extraction shooter, where one well-placed shot from a more experienced player half a mile away can wipe out your last thirty minutes of progress.

Scratch & Peek

Identify the cover art while scratching off as little foil as possible.

0 Points
Medium
0 %
Scratch to reveal
Low reveal = bigger bonus
0 / 10

Results

0

High Score: 0

—

More Games
Scratch & Peek Identify the cover art while scratching off as little foil as possible.
EasyMediumHardPermadeath
0 Points
Medium
0 %
Scratch to reveal
Low reveal = bigger bonus
0 / 10
Results
0
High Score: 0 —
More Games

Gray Zone Warfare has PvP and PvPvE, but also an option for just PvE, solo or with a squad. This relatively minor option winds up having a significant impact on the Gray Zone experience as a whole, as players can essentially play it as a cooperative shooter if they wish. Not only is this great for new players still learning the ropes, but also for more established PvP players looking to take things down a gear. Again, Gray Zone Warfare is trying to tell a Roadside Picnic -inspired story, and a less sweaty, more relaxed PvE mode facilitates that. Best of all, there are no separate saves or characters for these modes: you can seamlessly alternate between PvP, PvE, and PvPvE without losing progress.

Gray Zone Warfare’s 0.4 Update Makes It Even Better

Gray Zone Warfare has been picking up steam since its release into early access in 2024, but the most recent patch has reignited interest in the game considerably. Launched on March 31, Update 0.4 introduces countless improvements to Gray Zone , with some of the most notable including:

  • Over 100 new Tasks and Contracts (quests)
  • Over 25 new locations
  • Improvements to lighting, visual effects, and UI
  • More lore to discover
  • Eight new weapons and over 150 new gear pieces

The game is still in early access, so it should go without saying that it’s not perfect. For instance, Gray Zone Warfare ’s enemy AI is a bit lacking in the intelligence department, and quest design can be hit or miss. But the consensus is that Gray Zone is in a surprisingly terrific state so far, to the point where it’s already a suitable replacement for ARC Raiders , Marathon , Tarkov , and other leading extraction shooters/military sims. Hopefully, the game manages to keep this momentum heading into its 1.0 launch, whenever that may be.

Gray Zone Warfare

Follow
Followed
FPS
Survival
Open-World
Systems
Released
April 30, 2024
ESRB
m
Developer(s)
Madfinger Games
Publisher(s)
Madfinger Games
Engine
Unreal Engine 5

WHERE TO PLAY

DIGITAL

Following a mysterious event on a fictional Southeast Asian island, the entire area has been put under international quarantine. With almost all the civilian population evacuated by the United Nations, three PMCs are tasked by their enigmatic clients to explore the region, uncover its secrets, and bring back anything of value.

Embrace the challenges of an intense tactical FPS featuring a realistic ballistic simulation that incorporates precise real-world values and authentic ballistics models. In this high-stakes environment, every move matters, and every fight could result in the loss of your hard-earned gear and progress.

Create your own firearm that perfectly suits your needs and playstyle. By exchanging, removing, or adding hundreds of various parts, mounts, and accessories, the behavior and performance of each weapon can change, making it adaptable to any situation.

Discover a unique health system that moves away from the common concept of hitpoints to simulate the human body realistically. Each injury affects your perception and performance. Mastering injury identification and finding appropriate solutions are crucial for survival and helping your teammates.

Explore a sprawling 42km² of the Democratic Republic of Lamang, a fictional Southeast Asian country inspired by the stunning landscapes of Laos. Utilize explorable Landing Zones and helicopters to move through a persistent world that keeps living even when you’re not playing.

Immerse yourself in a mature experience with an engaging storyline told through numerous missions. Encounter a colorful cast of characters, each with their secrets and agendas. Navigate the web of lies, decide who you can trust, and expose the truth. Nothing is black and white, only different shades of gray…


Genre(s)
FPS, Survival, Open-World
Powered by

item.title: Windrose Reaches Incredible Milestone Less Than One Week After Launch
item.description:
Windrose , the new pirate survival hit, officially set a new record by selling more than one million copies within its first six days of release. This success for Windrose comes as a surprise to many, especially given the crowded nature of the open-world survival genre lately. While the game features a vast world to explore, the developers at Kraken Express are currently focused on maintaining the surge of new players. It's worth noting that the game has already reached a peak concurrent player count on Steam, exceeding 220,000. This level of engagement has quickly turned Windrose into one of the most talked-about releases of the season.

The journey to this successful launch was not a straight line for the development team, who recently rebranded as Kraken Express. The project was originally known as Crosswind and was intended to be a large-scale multiplayer online game (MMO) with a heavy focus on player-versus-player combat. However, the team of roughly 60 veteran developers decided to pivot the design toward a buy-to-play PvE adventure instead. This change was driven by the team's desire to focus more on the "souls-lite" ground combat and deep survival mechanics that they felt would resonate better with their audience. The decision seems to have paid off, as the title launched at a $26 price point and immediately began climbing the charts. The studio has acknowledged that this pivot required them to rebuild many of the game's core systems from the ground up to support a more traditional survival experience.

Windrose Triumphs on the High Seas

Kraken Express confirmed that a total of one million copies have been sold across all platforms, including the Epic Games Store. Despite the popularity, the rapid influx of players has brought some expected technical challenges. The developers have been working around the clock to address server stability and multiplayer connection issues that cropped up over the launch weekend. A recent fixer-patch has been deployed to add manual server selection and automatic save backups as stopgap solutions while more permanent fixes are developed. Even with these growing pains, the reception on Steam remains "Very Positive," with an 89% approval rating from thousands of users. The concurrent player count for Windrose actually tripled within the first week, jumping from roughly 69,000 on launch day to over 222,000 just a few days later. Fans have praised the game for its optimization and for delivering the kind of depth that larger "AAAA" titles have recently struggled to provide.

For those just starting their journey, the narrative begins with a significant loss that sets the stage for the entire experience. Players take on the role of a once-powerful pirate captain who has been stripped of their fortune and crew following a brutal assault by the legendary Blackbeard. Left for dead among the wreckage of their former life, the protagonist must find a way to survive on a mysterious shore and slowly reclaim their standing in the world. This "Age of Piracy" setting features a dark and supernatural twist, with players uncovering secrets hidden throughout the environment. The game encourages players to recruit various NPCs to join their new settlement, which helps boost productivity and allows them to eventually command a new fleet of ships. This focus on a personal comeback story adds a layer of motivation to the standard survival loop of gathering resources and building shelters.

The gameplay loop in this early access title blends several familiar genres to create something that fans are finding hard to put down. The naval navigation is heavily inspired by Assassin's Creed 4: Black Flag , which the developers consider the gold standard for pirate gaming. However, combat on land takes a different approach, using a "souls-lite" system that emphasizes parrying and dashing rather than simple button-mashing. Many players have compared the crafting and base-building elements in Windrose to hits like Valheim , noting that the progression feels rewarding and polished for an early-access build. Solo players can enjoy the experience offline, but those who want to team up can host their own servers or join dedicated ones to take on bosses together.

Balance the critic averages

Critical Mass

Pick games to balance the averages.

Diff: —

Results
0
—
More Games
Choose a game

The sales figures continue to be impressive, cementing the title's status as a breakout indie success. It is currently the top-selling game on Steam in the United States and holds the number two spot globally. While the game is currently a PC exclusive, the developers have mentioned they may look into Windrose console versions for PlayStation 5 or Xbox once the title reaches its 1.0 release. For now, the team is focused on expanding the world and refining the features already in place. As reported by Automaton, a partnership with Pocketpair has helped the game gain significant traction in Japan, further boosting its international reach. With millions of wishlists still active and a growing community on Discord, the horizon looks bright for this new pirate adventure as it continues through early access.

Windrose

Follow
Followed
MMO
Survival
Exploration
RPG
Crafting
Systems
Released
April 14, 2026
Developer(s)
Kraken Express
Publisher(s)
Kraken Express, Pocketpair Publishing
Multiplayer
Online Co-Op, Online Multiplayer
Number of Players
Single-player
6 Images

WHERE TO PLAY

DIGITAL

Windrose is a survival adventure set in an alternative Age of Piracy. It features the classic “build, craft, survive” formula along with intense combat and engaging exploration on land and sea.

Progress through vast procedurally generated biomes filled with hidden mysteries, hand-crafted dungeons and quests. Gather your crew and captain your ship through brutal naval combat with boarding actions and seamless transitions between ship and shore.

Defeat challenging bosses on your swashbuckling adventure driven by real-world characters and supernatural forces alike.

THE YEAR IS 17XX - Every legend begins with a reckless crossing. You are a captain who dares to challenge Blackbeard. What begins as a grounded story of survival and revenge draws you into a growing conflict between empires, pirate clans, and mysterious dark powers looming on the horizon. Windrose is steeped in the allure of the Age of Piracy.

CONQUER THE SEAS - Answer the call of the seas and move seamlessly between ship and shore. Naval combat is shaped by your decisions, whether you’re trading cannon fire at range or closing in for fierce boarding actions. Equip and customize your ship to suit your playstyle, from nimble ketch to versatile brig and monstrous frigate. And when the cannons go silent, claim your spoils and share a sea shanty with your crew as you sail onward.

SURVIVAL PERFECTED - Establish a foothold in vibrant, diverse biomes, gather resources, and build to your own taste, from simple shelters to elaborate mansions and fully developed forts. Recruit NPCs and grow your settlement to speed up harvesting and production.

This world belongs to the brave and the curious, so venture into the uncharted lands. Over 100 hand-crafted dungeons and points of interest contain endless secrets and treasures, though such rewards rarely come without risk. Trade with different factions to gain the edge you’ll need.

SWASHBUCKLING ADVENTURE - Hack, slash, batter, and shoot your way forward! Master a wide arsenal of melee weapons and firearms. Parry and dodge enemy attacks, chain different strikes, and keep an eye out for new gear, including sabers, rapiers, halberds, greatswords, pistols, muskets, and more.

Shape your combat style through talents and flexible loadouts with unique armor sets. Use food and potions to gain powerful buffs. Test your skills against a wide range of enemies and challenging bosses, defeat them, and claim their treasures.

HOISE THE COLORS - Windrose is fully playable solo offline or in co-op with friends, supporting up to 8 players, with both self-hosted and dedicated servers available. Procedural generation will make each journey stand out. Please note: due to performance, especially in the late game, we recommend to play in the party up to 4 players for the optimal experience.

Steam Deck Compatibility
Unknown
Early Access Release
April 14, 2026
Genre(s)
MMO, Survival, Exploration, RPG, Crafting
Platform(s)
PC
Powered by
